violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. -Raw hamburger on top of cheese in the refrigerator.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Bare wood surfaces in the kitchen.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Ice machine needs cleaned.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Kitchen needs cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Ceiling areas in need of repair in the kitchen.
